settings.content:
# Azure Migration & Modernization PoC - Environment Dashboard

```
  On-Prem VNet (10.0.0.0/16)  ──S2S VPN──  Hub VNet (10.10.0.0/16)  ──Peering──  Spoke VNets
  ┌─────────────────────┐                 ┌──────────────────┐                   ├─ Spoke1 (10.20.0.0/16) Rehost
  │ Hyper-V Host (D8s)  │                 │ Firewall Basic   │                   ├─ Spoke2 (10.21.0.0/16) DB PaaS
  │ DC01/WEB01/SQL01    │                 │ Bastion Basic    │                   ├─ Spoke3 (10.22.0.0/16) Container
  │ Migrate Appliance   │                 │ VPN Gateway      │                   └─ Spoke4 (10.23.0.0/16) Full PaaS
  └─────────────────────┘                 └──────────────────┘
```

## Hub Resources (rg-hub)

| Resource | Type | Status |
|----------|------|--------|
| [afw-hub](https://portal.azure.com/#@/resource/subscriptions/SUB_ID/resourceGroups/rg-hub/providers/Microsoft.Network/azureFirewalls/afw-hub/overview) | Azure Firewall Basic | Deployed |
| [bas-hub](https://portal.azure.com/#@/resource/subscriptions/SUB_ID/resourceGroups/rg-hub/providers/Microsoft.Network/bastionHosts/bas-hub/overview) | Bastion Basic | Deployed |
| [vpngw-hub](https://portal.azure.com/#@/resource/subscriptions/SUB_ID/resourceGroups/rg-hub/providers/Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworkGateways/vpngw-hub/overview) | VPN Gateway VpnGw1 | Deployed |
| [law-hub](https://portal.azure.com/#@/resource/subscriptions/SUB_ID/resourceGroups/rg-hub/providers/Microsoft.OperationalInsights/workspaces/law-hub/overview) | Log Analytics | Deployed |
| [rt-spokes-to-fw](https://portal.azure.com/#@/resource/subscriptions/SUB_ID/resourceGroups/rg-hub/providers/Microsoft.Network/routeTables/rt-spokes-to-fw/overview) | Route Table | Deployed |

## Network Config

### VNet Peering
| Peering | State |
|---------|-------|
| Hub ↔ Spoke1 | Connected |
| Hub ↔ Spoke2 | Connected |
| Hub ↔ Spoke3 | Connected |
| Hub ↔ Spoke4 | Connected |

### Firewall Rules
| Rule | Source → Dest | Ports |
|------|--------------|-------|
| OnPrem→Spokes | 10.0/16 → 10.20-23/16 | Any |
| Spokes→OnPrem | 10.20-23/16 → 10.0/16 | Any |
| DNS Outbound | 10.0/8 → * | 53 |
| HTTPS Out | 10.0/8 → * | 443 |
| HTTP Out | 10.0/8 → * | 80 |

## Spoke1: Rehost
[rg-spoke1](https://portal.azure.com/#@/resource/subscriptions/SUB_ID/resourceGroups/rg-spoke1/overview)

- **VNet**: 10.20.0.0/16
- **Subnets**: snet-web, snet-db
- **Target**: Azure VM x 2
- **Tool**: Copilot Migration Agent + Azure Migrate

## Spoke2: DB PaaS
[rg-spoke2](https://portal.azure.com/#@/resource/subscriptions/SUB_ID/resourceGroups/rg-spoke2/overview)

- **VNet**: 10.21.0.0/16
- **Subnets**: snet-web, snet-pep
- **Target**: VM + Azure SQL
- **Tool**: Copilot App Mod + DMS

## Spoke3: Container
[rg-spoke3](https://portal.azure.com/#@/resource/subscriptions/SUB_ID/resourceGroups/rg-spoke3/overview)

- **VNet**: 10.22.0.0/16
- **Subnets**: snet-aca, snet-pep
- **Target**: Container Apps + Azure SQL
- **Tool**: Copilot App Mod + Docker

## Spoke4: Full PaaS
[rg-spoke4](https://portal.azure.com/#@/resource/subscriptions/SUB_ID/resourceGroups/rg-spoke4/overview)

- **VNet**: 10.23.0.0/16
- **Subnets**: snet-appservice, snet-pep
- **Target**: App Service + Azure SQL
- **Tool**: Copilot App Mod

## Azure Policy

| Policy | Effect |
|--------|--------|
| Allowed locations (JE/JW) | Deny |
| Require Environment tag on RG | Deny |
| Storage public access | Audit |
| SQL auditing enabled | Audit |
| SQL public access | Audit |
| Management ports closed | Audit |
| App Service public access | Audit |

## Route Table

| Route | Prefix | Next Hop |
|-------|--------|----------|
| default-to-firewall | 0.0.0.0/0 | Firewall Private IP |
| onprem-to-firewall | 10.0.0.0/16 | Firewall Private IP |

## Tags (All Resources)

| Tag | Value |
|-----|-------|
| Environment | PoC |
| SecurityControl | ignore |
